title: Ryanair to create 450 jobs in £40m Prestwick Airport expansion

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Ryanair to create 450 jobs in £40m Prestwick Airport expansion. Hundreds of jobs will be created after a £40 million investment project was announced for Prestwick Airport.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair to create 450 jobs in £40m Prestwick Airport expansion
